executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Marketing independent verification remains fail-closed because stale external-owner evidence (marketing_loop_independent_verification.json age=~47.7h) and primary-repo adoption is measurement-pending.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence and rerun marketing independent verification.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on stale independent verification
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification artifact is ~47.7h stale and reports verdict=fail. No fresh measurable outcome evidence from the marketing owner loop.
findings.root_cause: Marketing owner loop has not produced fresh primary-repo adoption outcome evidence that would clear independent verification.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh adoption evidence and rerun marketing independent verification.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology has 3 transient external errors, architecture-owned healthy
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection: 22 total, 22 enabled, 0 disabled, 3 running, 3 errors (all external domains, all consecutiveErrors=1).
findings.root_cause: Transient errors: backlink-tracker (gateway restart interrupt), blocked-channel-recovery (external domain), internal-linking-watchdog (external domain). All at strike 1.
findings.recommended_fix: Monitor for recurrence. Escalate only on strike 3.

findings.title: Architecture pipeline all green: checker→verifier→independent
findings.mechanism: Checker: AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Verifier: ok:true, errors:[]. Independent: qualified_pass. Loop integrity: agent-architecture-watchdog=ok.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-owned gates fully coherent. Only external marketing evidence blocks full-stack green.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs are history-only, not live runtime blockers
findings.mechanism: 18 disabled entries in jobs.json history (including 12x duplicate marketing-measurement-hold-release at-job artifacts with deleteAfterRun). Live Gateway topology: 0 disabled.
findings.root_cause: Historical at-job artifacts and stale entries persist in jobs.json. No live architectural impact.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology.

findings.title: Self-repair self-improve audit reports 2 HIGH findings
findings.mechanism: self_repair_self_improve_audit.py detected 2 HIGH-severity findings across 22 audited loops.
findings.root_cause: Self-repair audit loop needs attention; findings may relate to marketing closure or loop ownership drift.
findings.recommended_fix: Review self_repair_self_improve_audit_latest.json for the 2 HIGH findings and route to the appropriate owner loop.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Checker→verifier→independent pipeline refreshed with all gates green. No new repairs required — prior-run fixes (checker-schema gap, verifier allowed-set extension) continue to hold.
repairs_applied_this_run.before: Prior run fixed checker-schema and extended verifier allowed-set with qualified_pass.
repairs_applied_this_run.after: Checker: AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK, Verifier: ok:true errors:[], Independent: qualified_pass. All fresh at 14:52.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms architecture verifier fails closed on stale signoff, live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.
external_blockers: Marketing independent verification: stale (~47.7h) and verdict=fail

ordered_fix_plan.title: Marketing owner loop produces fresh measurable outcome evidence
ordered_fix_plan.blocked_by: primary-repo movement measurement-pending; marketing-measurement-hold-release at-job currently running

ordered_fix_plan.title: Rerun marketing independent verification after outcome evidence lands
Architecture watchdog re-runs full cycle after marketing green

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are all green, but marketing independent verification is 47.7h stale and still fails closed. The only blocker for whole-stack green is external to architecture. Additionally, self-repair audit reports 2 HIGH findings that need routing.

notes: Architecture checker→verifier→independent verification all green this run; no new repairs needed.
Live cron: 22 total, 22 enabled, 0 disabled, 3 running (ralph-docs-supervisor-precheck + marketing-measurement-hold-release + this watchdog), 3 transient errors (all external, consecutiveErrors=1).
Marketing independent verification artifact is ~47.7h stale — the single remaining blocker for whole-stack green.
Self-repair self-improve audit: 2 HIGH findings across 22 audited loops. Needs routing to owner loops.
Persisted disabled jobs in jobs.json: 18 entries (including 12x duplicate marketing-measurement-hold-release at-job artifacts). None are live.
Docs verifier stable: 121 consecutive passes since last failure.
